mdSummary:
# PullToRefresh

Pull To Refresh component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pull-to-refresh

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PullToRefresh | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| PullToRefresh | OnRefresh | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| PullToRefresh | ThresholdPx | `double` | `80` |  |
| PullToRefresh | MaxPullPx | `double` | `120` |  |
| PullToRefresh | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PullToRefresh | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (PullToRefresh) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnRefresh` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<PullToRefresh />
```

`--color-background`, `--color-foreground`, `--radius`
